channel.title: 寂照
channel.description: 在尘世中修行，在修行中自在

item.title: 工作的痛苦，藏在对热爱的执着里
item.link: https://blog.3333444.xyz/posts/2026-03-23-工作的痛苦-藏在对热爱的执着里.html
item.description:
面对孩子的喧闹，多数人习惯性地陷入焦躁。
遍计所执之缘起
带孩子的烦恼，表面上是物理声波的干扰，实则是内心对安静的遍计所执。
耳根反闻之实修
在喧嚣爆发的当下，尝试入流亡所的法门。
境缘损益之落地
当心境从受害者转为观照者，孩子
item.guid: https://blog.3333444.xyz/posts/2026-03-23-工作的痛苦-藏在对热爱的执着里.html

item.title: Mind Over Malady: Zen Wisdom for True Healing 🌿
item.description: Buddha taught that physical illness originates in the mind. When elements are imbalanced, we must return to mindfulness

item.title: The Path of Lay Precepts: Freedom Through Discipline 🕊️
item.description: Many perceive precepts as restrictive rules, yet they are the foundation of true liberation. For lay practitioners, the

item.title: Quiet Progress: Reaching Focus Through Stillness 🌙
item.description: True cultivation lies not in momentary passion, but in the steady state of "unmoving dharma nature and silent progress."
